meta_description: Learn how to SaaS starter kit and overcome no SaaS knowledge. A Advanced-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: SaaS Starter Kit for Freelancers: Overcome No SaaS Knowledge
content.seo_description: Bridge the gap in SaaS development with this advanced checklist. Master Antigravity and Claude Code to ship scalable SaaS products for clients with speed.
content.answer_block: Stop building from scratch. A professional SaaS starter kit provides the architectural foundation—authentication, database schemas, and billing—needed to launch in days, not months. By leveraging Antigravity for structural scaffolding and Claude Code for iterative implementation, you bypass the learning curve and deliver production-ready SaaS applications to high-paying clients immediately.
content.intro:
The client deadline is looming, the architecture is a blank void, and the pressure of 'no SaaS knowledge' is suffocating your potential. You aren't just missing code; you're missing the muscle memory of a thousand successful deployments. The difference between a struggling freelancer and a high-ticket SaaS engineer isn't raw talent—it's the relentless use of superior tooling.

Today, we dismantle that barrier. We are moving beyond manual boilerplate and into the era of AI-orchestrated development. By integrating Antigravity’s rapid scaffolding with the relentless precision of Claude Code, we turn your lack of experience into a competitive advantage. It is time to stop guessing and start shipping.

steps.title: Architect the Core Infrastructure
steps.description: Define your SaaS foundation using Antigravity to generate a secure, scalable directory structure that includes authentication, database ORM, and API routes.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a production-ready Next.js 15 app structure with Supabase integration, Auth.js for multi-tenant support, and Tailwind CSS configuration. Include a clean folder structure for services, hooks, and components.

steps.title: Automate Database Schema Migration
steps.description: Ensure your data layer is robust by using AI to map complex relationships and generate Prisma schemas that handle multi-tenancy natively.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a Prisma schema for a B2B SaaS platform including User, Organization, Subscription, and Project entities. Ensure Row Level Security (RLS) policies are defined for organization-based data isolation.

steps.title: Implement Stripe Billing Logic
steps.description: Handle recurring revenue seamlessly by scaffolding your subscription logic via the Stripe API directly into your starter kit.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Scaffold a Stripe webhook handler and subscription checkout flow. Include logic for plan upgrades/downgrades and database sync for subscription status.

steps.title: Build High-Conversion UI Components
steps.description: Use Claude Code to rapidly iterate on your dashboard UI, ensuring it meets professional design standards without manual CSS heavy-lifting.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a responsive SaaS dashboard sidebar and header using Shadcn UI. Include a dynamic user profile menu and organization switcher.

steps.title: End-to-End Automated Testing
steps.description: Validate your entire stack by generating unit tests for your API routes and end-to-end flows for user authentication.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate Playwright tests for the user onboarding and subscription checkout flow. Ensure mocking for Stripe webhooks.

pro_tips: Always force the AI to write unit tests alongside business logic; it prevents the 'spaghetti code' trap common in rapid prototyping.
Use environment-specific secret management from day one; never hardcode keys, even in your starter kit.
Standardize your component naming convention across all client projects to make switching between codebases instantaneous.
Leverage Claude Code's memory by keeping a 'project-context.md' file that defines your preferred architectural patterns.
Prioritize Row Level Security (RLS) in your database setup before you write a single line of frontend code to ensure client data integrity.
content.next_steps: Deploy your initial scaffold to Vercel, connect your production database, and begin adding custom business logic requested by your client.
content.conversion_block: You now have the exact blueprint to build professional SaaS products that command premium rates. Don't let the technical complexity hold you back when the tools to automate your success are already in your hands. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
